key_evidence: OHCHR: military airstrikes killed 982 civilians in 2025 (+53% YoY), including 287 children
Amnesty (Jan 2026): junta atrocities surging five years post-coup
UN expert (Mar 2026): Myanmar at a 'crossroads'; world must not forsake civilians
methodology_note: Floor confirmation at 0.0. The 53% YoY increase in airstrike civilian deaths is a deepening of an already-floor pattern; junta is the primary agent of harm. Escalation noted as evidence annotation; no composite movement (already at floor).
